docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DINIO, BIENVENIDO AS TO DEFENDANT CONDE, SERVELINA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-19-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CONDE, SERVELINA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DINIO, BIENVENIDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CONDE, SERVELINA $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $545.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY DINIO, BIENVENIDO AS TO DEFENDANT CONDE, SERVELINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-2014 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-22-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-22-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CONDE, SERVELINA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2014 - JUDGMENT.
